name: ai_workflow_generator
description: Generate AI image/video generation workflow files for ComfyUI, A1111, Diffusers, Replicate, Stability AI, Midjourney, DALL-E, and other platforms.

description.description: Natural language description of the desired workflow. Include target platform, model details, and feature requirements.

workflow.description: Generated workflow content (JSON, Python code, or prompt text)

dependencies.description: Markdown list of required model files and download URLs

instructions.description: Usage notes, parameter tuning advice, and troubleshooting
